instruction_text:
ACME Health Plans — Prior Authorization routing (synthetic)

For commercial PPO members: submit outpatient rehabilitation via the ACME Care Portal.
Portal: https://portal.example-payer.test/auth

For legacy fax-only accounts (listed on card back): fax clinical reviews to 1-800-555-0199.

Footer (may be outdated): Fax all PT authorizations to 1-800-555-0142.
